Syllabus hub

Every syllabus in one place

Clean paper-by-paper views with update badges for the newest rules.

Non-Gazetted 2nd ClassNew 2082

खरिदार

Kharidar

Paper 1: Prelim Objective - GK & Office Skills · 100 marks · 1 hr 30 min+
Paper 1objective

General knowledge

  • Nepal polity
  • Geography
  • History
  • Current affairs

Basic office work

  • Letter drafting
  • File handling
  • Record keeping
  • Typing familiarity

Arithmetic basics

  • Percentages
  • Ratios
  • Simple interest
  • Averages
Paper 2: Governance and Service Awareness · 100 marks · 3 hr+
Paper 2subjective

Governance system

  • Federal structure
  • Constitutional organs
  • Public administration
  • Policy cycle

Administration and ethics

  • Civil service values
  • Transparency
  • Accountability
  • Citizen service

Development and public finance

  • Planning
  • Budgeting
  • Monitoring
  • Service delivery
Paper 3: Office Management and Service Group Subject · 100 marks · 3 hr+
Paper 3subjective

Public administration in Nepal

  • Ministries
  • District administration
  • Local governance
  • Service flow

Relevant laws and procedures

  • Public Service Act
  • Rules and regulations
  • Office procedure
  • Records management

Service ethics and case studies

  • Decision-making
  • Conflicts of interest
  • Grievance handling
  • Citizen charter
View full exam page
PDF Coming Soon
Non-Gazetted 1st ClassNew 2082

नायब सुब्बा

NaSu / Nayab Subba

Paper 1: Objective Prelim · 100 marks · 1 hr 30 min+
Paper 1objective

Logical reasoning and analytical ability

  • Series
  • Coding-decoding
  • Direction sense
  • Puzzles

Quantitative aptitude

  • Ratio
  • Percentage
  • Average
  • Time and work

General awareness

  • Current affairs
  • Nepal geography
  • Constitution basics
  • Government structure
Paper 2: Governance and Service Laws · 100 marks · 3 hr+
Paper 2subjective

Governance system

  • Federal structure
  • Constitutional organs
  • Public administration
  • Policy cycle

Administration and ethics

  • Civil service values
  • Transparency
  • Accountability
  • Citizen service

Development and public finance

  • Planning
  • Budgeting
  • Monitoring
  • Service delivery

Service delivery systems

  • Case handling
  • Office communication
  • Public interface
  • File movement
Paper 3: Service Group - Unified Subject · 100 marks · 3 hr+
Paper 3subjective

Administration / law / finance

  • Service-specific theory
  • Legal provisions
  • Practical cases
  • Reports

Office operations

  • Correspondence
  • Registers
  • Archives
  • Meetings

Interview-facing preparation

  • Presentation
  • Reasoning
  • Personal experience
  • Current issues
View full exam page

  • Federal structure

  • Procurement

Technical Non-GazettedNew 2082

कम्प्युटर अपरेटर

Computer Operator

Paper 1: Computer and GK Objective · 100 marks · 1 hr 30 min+
Paper 1objective

Basic computer operations

  • File management
  • Shortcut keys
  • Typing practice
  • Windows basics

Office suite and data entry

  • Word processing
  • Spreadsheet basics
  • Presentation
  • Form filling

Practical speed test

  • Accuracy
  • 15-minute format
  • Nepali/English typing
  • Keyboard familiarity
Paper 2: Office Procedures and Service Delivery · 100 marks · 3 hr+
Paper 2subjective

Public administration in Nepal

  • Ministries
  • District administration
  • Local governance
  • Service flow

  • Public Service Act
  • Rules and regulations
  • Office procedure
  • Records management

  • Decision-making
  • Conflicts of interest
  • Grievance handling
